title: selinopsis foetida
intro: Selinopsis foetida, also known as stinking chamomile, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of stinking chamomile include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and soothe skin irritations. Selinopsis foetida can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine and home remedies.
